segments.text: Most people pick stocks on gut. Let's change that. Open Screener. Search Reliance.
segments.fallback_text: Most people pick stocks on gut. Let's change that. Open Screener. Search Reliance.
segments.subtitle: Open Screener and type Reliance Industries.
segments.spoken_text: Most people pick stocks on gut. Let's change that. Open Screener. Search Reliance.

segments.text: There it is. Click Reliance. Now the real checklist begins.
segments.fallback_text: There it is. Click Reliance. Now the real checklist begins.
segments.subtitle: Click Reliance and open the company page.
segments.spoken_text: There it is. Click Reliance. Now the real checklist begins.

segments.text: First, check the big three at the top: Market Cap, P/E, and ROCE. Then open quarterly results and make sure profits are actually climbing.
segments.fallback_text: First, check the big three at the top: Market Cap, P/E, and ROCE. Then open quarterly results and make sure profits are actually climbing.
segments.subtitle: Check the top metrics, then open quarterly results.
segments.spoken_text: First, check the big three at the top: Market Cap, P/E, and ROCE. Then open quarterly results and make sure profits are actually climbing.

segments.text: Next, sweep through Profit and Loss and the Balance Sheet. Revenues should rise, earnings should look clean, and debt should stay under control.
segments.fallback_text: Next, sweep through Profit and Loss and the Balance Sheet. Revenues should rise, earnings should look clean, and debt should stay under control.
segments.subtitle: Check Profit and Loss, then the Balance Sheet.
segments.spoken_text: Next, sweep through Profit and Loss and the Balance Sheet. Revenues should rise, earnings should look clean, and debt should stay under control.

segments.text: No stock idea yet? Hit Screens. That is your cheat code.
segments.fallback_text: No stock idea yet? Hit Screens. That is your cheat code.
segments.subtitle: No stock idea yet? Click Screens.
segments.spoken_text: No stock idea yet? Hit Screens. That is your cheat code.

segments.text: Now click Show all screens and find this exact filter: High Growth, High RoE, Low PE. Fast growers, efficient businesses, sane valuation. Open it.
segments.fallback_text: Now click Show all screens and find this exact filter: High Growth, High RoE, Low PE. Fast growers, efficient businesses, sane valuation. Open it.
segments.subtitle: Find and open the High Growth, High RoE, Low PE screen.
segments.spoken_text: Now click Show all screens and find this exact filter: High Growth, High RoE, Low PE. Fast growers, efficient businesses, sane valuation. Open it.

segments.text: The filter has done the hunting. Ganesh Infra makes the shortlist, so open it and run the same four-point check. That is how you go from guessing to investing with a plan.
segments.fallback_text: The filter has done the hunting. Ganesh Infra makes the shortlist, so open it and run the same four-point check. That is how you go from guessing to investing with a plan.
